description_long: This is a freestanding, open metal shelving unit with four wide, flat shelves supported by a geometric, angular frame. The frame is constructed from slender, metallic bars forming triangular side supports, giving the structure a modern, industrial look. Each shelf appears to be made of dark, textured metal, possibly steel, and is reinforced at the edges. The shelves are evenly spaced and lack any doors, drawers, or enclosed compartments, making the contents easily accessible from the front. The top of the frame is slightly angled, adding a distinctive visual element to the otherwise functional design. The overall construction suggests durability and suitability for outdoor or garage use in urban environments.
description: A modern, open metal shelving unit with four dark, flat shelves and a geometric, angular frame. The design is industrial and freestanding, with no doors or enclosed compartments.
description_view_0: The shelving unit is seen from above and slightly to the front, clearly showing all four shelves and the open, accessible design.
description_view_1: A side view highlights the angular, triangular frame and the thinness of the metal supports, with shelves stacked at an incline.
description_view_2: A direct side profile emphasizes the geometric structure and the spacing between the shelves, with the frame's triangular shape prominent.
description_view_3: A rear three-quarter view reveals the open back and the supporting frame, showing the shelves' depth and the lack of rear panels.
